name: DevElm

unions.name: Flags
unions.comment:
Flags for the `develm` program.

  - `Batch` performs tasks unordered.
  - `Sequence` performs tasks sequentially.
  - `OneOf` performs tasks optionally - `OneOf [("build", Build defaultBuild)]` is performed with `develm build`.

unions.name: Format
unions.comment:
Flag what format the program should be built to.

  - `EcmaScriptModule` allows for native JavaScript-module imports.
  - `ImmediatelyInvokedFunctionInvocation` exposes the `Elm` global along with a Node-compatible module.

unions.name: LogFlags
unions.comment: Log text messages to the console.

unions.name: Mode
unions.comment:
Flag what mode the program should be built in.

  - `Develop` is a development-build.
  - `Debug` is a development-build that includes the time-travelling debugger.
  - `Optimize` is a production-build that includes minification.

aliases.name: BuildFlags
aliases.comment: Flag DevElm to build an elm program.
aliases.type: { moduleName : String.String, outputPath : Maybe.Maybe String.String, format : DevElm.Format, mode : DevElm.Mode }

aliases.name: ServeFlags
aliases.comment: Flag DevElm to serve an elm program over HTTP.
aliases.type: { moduleName : String.String, hostname : String.String, port_ : Basics.Int, mode : DevElm.Mode, outputPath : String.String, documentPath : Maybe.Maybe String.String, contentTypes : Dict.Dict String.String String.String, headers : Dict.Dict String.String String.String }

aliases.name: TestFlags
aliases.comment: Flag DevElm to test Elm functions.
aliases.type: { seed : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Int, fuzz : Basics.Int, moduleName : String.String, testName : String.String }

values.name: defaultBuild
values.comment: The default-Flags for building Elm programs. It makes an unoptimized build of a module named `Main` into `build/main.js`

values.name: defaultServe
values.comment: The default-Flags for serving Elm programs. It assumes no HTML-document is present.

values.name: defaultTest
values.comment: The default-Flags for testing Elm functions.
